entries.name: chargeback-monitor-rate
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC. Computes rolling 60-day chargeback rate per tenant per network + fires ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded when rate crosses network's VDMP/MDMP threshold. Also dispatches CheckChargebackStatusJob per-provider for reconciliation loop.

entries.name: chargeback-mark-expired
entries.purpose: Every 2 hours. Finds chargebacks past evidence_due_by still in status='pending_evidence' + transitions them to expired (auto-loss). Also dispatches FinalizeChargebackJob for the finalization chain. High cadence — miss no more than 2h between deadline pass + auto-loss transition.

entries.name: chargeback-check-provider-status-stripe
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls Stripe for chargeback status changes. Stripe disputes take 30-45 days to resolve; hourly polling balances timeliness vs API rate limits.

entries.name: chargeback-check-provider-status-paddle
entries.purpose: Every 4h. Polls Paddle for chargeback status changes.

entries.name: chargeback-check-provider-status-adyen
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls Adyen for chargeback status changes.

entries.name: chargeback-check-provider-status-square
entries.purpose: Every 4h. Polls Square for chargeback status changes.

entries.name: chargeback-check-provider-status-paypal
entries.purpose: Hourly. Polls PayPal for chargeback status changes.

entries.name: chargeback-evidence-overdue-notifications
entries.purpose: Daily 09:00 UTC. Sweeps all pending_evidence chargebacks + fires ChargebackEvidenceOverdue at appropriate days_remaining buckets (7 / 3 / 1). Also fires per-chargeback escalating cadence notifications via the observer chain at the exact deadline offsets — this scheduled sweep is a safety net for any that slipped through.

entries.name: chargeback-monthly-rate-report
entries.purpose: 1st of each month 08:00 UTC. Generates + emails monthly chargeback rate report to admin + finance leaders. Includes rolling rate by network, threshold status, top reason codes, RDR/CE3 metrics, prevention recommendations. Actionable for merchant-account risk awareness.

entries.name: chargeback-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC. Hard-purge chargebacks + chargeback_evidence past 7-year (or 10-year Enterprise) retention. Invoice-linked chargebacks migrate to compliance_archive.chargebacks + compliance_archive.chargeback_evidence prior to cascade (financial-obligation retention).
